PWFBoostTools.h
1 // -*- C++ -*-
2 #ifndef PWFBOOSTARRAY2_H_
3 #define PWFBOOSTARRAY2_H_
4 
5 /* Author : dechaiss at Aug 28, 2014 3:41:04 PM 2014
6  * Generated by createNew
7  */
8 
9 #include <boost/multi_array.hpp>
10 
11 class PWFBoostTools
12 {
13 public:
14  typedef boost::multi_array<Arcane::Real,2> PWFArray2;
15  typedef PWFArray2::array_view<2>::type PWFArray2View;
16  typedef PWFArray2::index_range MatrixRange;
17  typedef PWFArray2::index_gen MatrixIndice;
18  typedef PWFArray2::extent_gen MatrixExtent;
19  typedef PWFArray2::array_view<1>::type PWFArrayView;
20 public:
21  Arcane::Integer dim1Size(PWFArray2& data) {return data.shape()[0];}
22  Arcane::Integer dim2Size(PWFArray2& data) {return data.shape()[1];}
23  void resize(PWFArray2& data, const Arcane::Integer row_size, const Arcane::Integer column_size)
24  {
25  data.resize(m_extents[row_size][column_size]);
26  }
27  PWFArray2View view(PWFArray2& data,
28  const Arcane::Integer dim1_first_index, const Arcane::Integer dim1_last_index,
29  const Arcane::Integer dim2_first_index, const Arcane::Integer dim2_last_index)
30  {
31  return data[m_indices[MatrixRange(dim1_first_index,dim1_last_index)]
32  [MatrixRange(dim2_first_index,dim2_last_index)]];
33  }
34  void fillDim1(PWFArray2& data, const Arcane::Integer dim2_index, const Arcane::Real value)
35  {
36  PWFArrayView view = data[m_indices[MatrixRange()][dim2_index]];
37  std::fill(view.begin(), view.end(), value);
38  }
39  void fillDim2(PWFArray2& data, const Arcane::Integer dim1_index, const Arcane::Real value)
40  {
41  PWFArrayView view = data[m_indices[dim1_index][MatrixRange()]];
42  std::fill(view.begin(), view.end(), value);
43  }
44  void print(PWFArray2 data, ostream& o)
45  {
46  for (Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < dim1Size(data); ++i)
47  {
48  for (Arcane::Integer j = 0; j < dim2Size(data); ++j)
49  {
50  o << "\"";
51  Arcane::Real r = data[i][j];
52  o << r;
53  o << "\"";
54  }
55  }
56  }
57  void fill(PWFArray2& data, const Arcane::Real value)
58  {
59  for (Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < data.shape()[0]; ++i) {
60  for (Arcane::Integer j = 0; j < data.shape()[1]; ++j) {
61  data[i][j] = value;
62  }
63  }
64  }
65 
66 private :
67  MatrixIndice m_indices;
68  MatrixExtent m_extents;
69 
70 };
71 
72 typedef PWFBoostTools PWFDataTools;
73 
74 #endif /* PWFBOOSTARRAY2_H_ */
